roles: Creator-educator: organic growth on Instagram Reels & YouTube Shorts
identity.tagline: make money with a personal brand on short-form (Reels/Shorts) without paid ads
identity.persona: NYC-based ~21-22 y/o college dropout entrepreneur; direct, contrarian, numbers-driven; documents income ($100k/mo, $1.2M from social media); blunt 'eat dirt and post' work ethic
domains: viral hooks (first 3 seconds, hook archetypes, AI-assisted hooks)
Instagram Reels / YouTube Shorts / TikTok algorithm & distribution
production workflow & batching (90 min/day, 7 reels in 2 hours)
monetization: high-ticket, course business, funnels, UGC, IG-story selling

platforms.course: https://contentacademy.io (The Content Academy / Content Academy Lite on Whop; '1,000 True Fans Mastercourse')

build.depth: exhaustive (channel-saturating on the in-window YouTube long-form corpus)
filters_applied: exclude videos < 3 min (user constraint) — 1 excluded: 'Content Games | Official Trailer' (174s)
exclude anything before 2024-06-01 (user constraint) — 13 pre-window videos excluded
exclude TikTok / Instagram / Shorts short-form (user constraint)
build.ep_kind_breakdown: procedure=555, belief=185, heuristic=172, reasoning=167, framework=160, stance=111, anecdote=100, observation=72, antipattern=62, prediction=7, axiom=4
build.ep_group_breakdown: monetization-offer=265, production-workflow=238, content-strategy=224, mindset-discipline=194, hooks=177, scripting=165, audience-psychology=123, creator-business-model=81, algorithm-distribution=67, growth-playbook=61
build.harvest_method: yt-dlp English captions (en-orig) -> deduped to clean timestamped text -> 16 parallel extraction agents -> EP delta -> contour import (0 rejected)

coverage_gaps: The Content Academy / '1,000 True Fans Mastercourse' (contentacademy.io, Whop) — PAID & gated, not harvested. Its methodology overlaps heavily with the free YouTube full-courses (s041, s057, s058, s062, s063) which ARE fully harvested. To deepen, supply legally-owned course material.
TikTok (@mino.mp4 / @minolee.mp4, 1M+) and Instagram (@minolee.mp4) short-form — EXCLUDED by user constraint (<3 min / shorts). The long-form YouTube corpus is the canon.
X/Twitter (@SigmaMino) text threads — not harvested (low marginal value vs the 28.7h video corpus; out of primary scope).
13 YouTube videos before 2024-06-01 excluded per the date constraint (older personal-brand/algorithm takes not represented).

Quotes are YouTube auto-caption grade (lowercase, occasional ASR errors) — verbatim at caption fidelity, not transcript-perfect. Deep-links jump to the exact second so the real audio always wins on any conflict.
faithfulness_smoke: 6 match / 0 partial / 0 contradiction over 6 held-out probes (runs/0001/faithfulness.md). Indicative only.
notes: DB built on local disk then copied to the project (SQLite write-locking fails on the WSL network share; reads are fine, so CHAT works in place). Fixed group taxonomy (10 groups) used across all extraction agents for cross-source coherence. ffmpeg/whisper not installed — all 67 sources had native English captions, so no ASR was needed (0 no-transcript sources).
